summary: Frontend-only E2E test of Soccer Scout app (folders, players, video analysis). Login, dashboard, folder CRUD (create/nested/rename/privacy/select/delete), match CRUD + move-to-folder, match detail roster (manual add, CSV import open, delete player), navigation to video analysis, and clip player tagging all passed. Annotation player tagging was not directly verified due to test-id mismatch (note-tool-btn vs annotate-tool-btn) but the form/select element exists in source. Processing-failed banner not triggered on the tested match (the existing match shows analysis cards in 'Failed — click to retry' state in the Overview section instead).

issues: AI analysis cards show 'Failed — click to retry' for Tactical/Player Ratings/Highlights on existing 'Team A vs Team B' match. This is the budget/processing failure state surfaced inside the Overview tab rather than the top-level processing-failed banner. May confuse users about retry vs reprocess.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' coming from MatchDetail.js line 371 (player-team-select option containing dynamic team_home text). Only a warning but should be cleaned up to avoid hydration noise.

action_items: Investigate why AI analyses (Tactical/Player Ratings/Highlights) are in Failed state on seed match 'Team A vs Team B' — likely Gemini budget/key issue. Failed state currently shown only via inline retry links inside Overview tab, not via the dedicated <processing-failed-banner> at top.
Fix React hydration warning in MatchDetail.js (line ~371): the <option> for player-team-select wraps a dynamic <span> child. Render plain text inside <option> instead.

(Minor) The data-testid for the annotate tool button differs from clip's pattern. In VideoAnalysis.js, the button uses key 'note' so testid is 'note-tool-btn'. Document or rename to 'annotate-tool-btn' for clarity if intended.
critical_code_review_comments: VideoAnalysis.js is 740+ lines combining video player, clips, annotations, AI tabs — consider splitting into ClipForm, AnnotationForm, AnalysisTabs sub-components for maintainability.
MatchDetail.js - pattern produces invalid HTML; React hydration warning in console.
Folder tree is rendered as flat list using useMemo (per problem statement) — works correctly; nested folder appears correctly in tree after creation.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: TEST_Folder_<n>_R, TEST_Nested_<n>, TEST_Home_<n> vs TEST_Away_<n> match, TEST_Player_<n> player. Folders deleted at end. Match and player still in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 listed features were exercised. Key data-testids: [data-testid='note-tool-btn'] opens the annotation form (not 'annotate-tool-btn'). Annotation form exposes [data-testid='annotation-player-select'] dropdown — verify by clicking note-tool-btn first. Clip form uses [data-testid='clip-player-tag-{playerId}'] toggle buttons (3 verified for 'Team A vs Team B'). The 'Team A vs Team B' match's video analysis is in failed state — its three analysis subtypes show inline 'Failed — click to retry' rather than a top-level banner. To trigger the [data-testid='processing-failed-banner'], a fresh reprocess attempt that fails would be needed. Match move dropdown (move-match-{id}-select) uses folder.id as option value.
rca of the issue: No blocking bugs found. Hydration warning RCA: in MatchDetail.js renders a span inside option; React 18+ flags this as invalid HTML structure. Fix: replace the wrapping with the raw {match.team_home} expression inside
